'''Pete Vilmur''' is senior writer and head of fan relations at [[Lucasfilm]] He also serves as editor of ''[[Bantha Tracks (newsletter)|Bantha Tracks]]'', a ''[[Star Wars Insider]]'' magazine department focusing on ''[[Star Wars]]'' fans. Vilmur succeeds former editor [[Mary Franklin]], who left Lucasfilm in [[2015]]. Vilmur is a board member of [[Rancho Obi-Wan]], author [[Stephen J. Sansweet]]'s initiative to preserve ''Star Wars'' cultural history.

==''Star Wars'' contributions==
*{{InsiderCite|71|A Fistful of Credits: The Star Wars Insider Collector's Spending Spree Challenge|A Fistful of Credits: The ''Star Wars Insider'' Collector's Spending Spree Challenge}} (November [[2003]])
*"Villain with a Thousand Faces: The History of [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] Collectibles," ''[[Vader: The Ultimate Guide]]'' (July [[2005]])
*{{InsiderCite|84|Posters of Episode IV: A New Hope|Posters of Episode IV: ''A New Hope''}} (September 2005)
*''[[The Star Wars Poster Book]]'' (October 2005)
*{{InsiderCite|85|Posters of Episode V: The Empire Strikes Back|Posters of Episode V: ''The Empire Strikes Back''}} (November 2005)
*{{UKFanCite|61|Posters of Episode IV: A New Hope|Posters of Episode IV: ''A New Hope''}} (December 2005)
*{{InsiderCite|86|Posters of Episode VI: Return of the Jedi|Posters of Episode VI: ''Return of the Jedi''}} (February [[2006]])
*"Over My Dead Body—[[Han Solo/Legends|Solo's]] Cover Story," online supplement to [[Star Wars Insider 89|''Star Wars Insider'' 89]] (August 2006)
*"[[AudioCast]]: Star Wars Goes to School," online supplement to [[Star Wars Insider 90|''Star Wars Insider'' 90]] (September 2006)
*"Inside the DVD Menus," ''[[Star Wars: The Official Magazine 66]]'' (October 2006)
*''[[The Star Wars Vault]]'', with [[Stephen J. Sansweet]] (October 2007)
*''[[Star Wars: The Complete Vader]]'', with [[Ryder Windham]] ([[October 27]], [[2009]])
